title: Module 1
content:
Static and dynamic force analysis of mechanisms (four bar linkages only)-
graphical method, virtual work method -D’Alembert’s principle-equivalent
dynamic systems reciprocating engine force analysis.

title: Module 2
content:
Energy Efficiency in Electricity Utilization: Flywheels-turning moment
diagrams for steam engines-four stroke internal combustion engine and
multi cylinder engines-coefficient of fluctuation of speed-coefficient of
fluctuation of energy-design of flywheels.

title: Module 3
content:
Balancing: static balancing-dynamic balancing-balancing of several masses
revolving in a single plane-several masses in different parallel planes-
balancing of single cylinder reciprocating engines.Gyroscopic couple-effects
on the stability of automobiles-two wheeler and four wheeler, stability of
ships and air crafts

title: Module 4
content:
Vibration-free vibration of single degree of freedom systems-equation of
motion Newton’s method-energy method-natural frequency-undamped and
damped systems alogarithmic decrement-forced vibration-response of SDOF
systems to harmonic excitation-whirling of shaft-vibration absorber-
transmissibility
